|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `backoff_parameters` | **Type**: `NYT::TExponentialBackoffOptions`
**Default value**: `{'backoff_jitter': 0.1, 'backoff_multiplier': 1.5, 'invocation_count': 10, 'max_backoff': 5000, 'min_backoff': 1000}`
Parameters for exponential backoff on gRPC error retries. ||
|| `read_from_instant` | **Type**: `std::optional<TInstant>`
Force reading to start from this point (ISO-8601 format). If set, overrides the position restored from the persistent state. ||
|| `max_lookback` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `1h`
Upper bound for the `lookback` duration on a cold start. ||
